rag_rules: Fix missing semicolon in AGREE assume/guarantee statements to avoid syntax errors.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to ports.
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts.
Declare constants and equations in component type annexes for visibility.
Guard pre() comparisons with initialized state flags to avoid undefined behavior.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `->` for temporal recurrence and `pre()` for previous values in AGREE.
AGREE logical operators include `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`.
Component implementation annexes are for assignments and bindings, not type contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not place component port references in type contracts unless properly declared as variables.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available in AGREE scope.
